wordplay_note: Philip K. Dick as a character — the skeptical rational half
card_description: Phil (meaning "Phil = horse-lover (Greek philos + hippos)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *VALIS*. Author and narrator who is the skeptical counterpart to Horselover Fat. Name note: Philip K. Dick as a character — the skeptical rational half. The author watching himself go mad — or become enlightened. First appears in *VALIS*.

reference.brief: Author and narrator who is the skeptical counterpart to Horselover Fat
reference.significance: The author watching himself go mad — or become enlightened
